summary.en: The largest marketplace for finding game masters to host digital tabletop games like D&D.
summary.zh: 最大的遊戲主持人媒合平台，協助找人主持《龍與地下城》等數位桌遊。

highlight.en: Instead of digging through Discord servers, Reddit, and forums, players use StartPlaying to discover and book paid GMs for tabletop sessions.
highlight.zh: 玩家不必再翻找 Discord 伺服器、Reddit 與論壇，透過 StartPlaying 即可直接探索並預約付費的桌遊主持人。

summary.en: Building programmable, virus-based therapies to fight antimicrobial resistance.
summary.zh: 打造可程式化的病毒型療法，以對抗抗藥性威脅。

highlight.en: Felix is building the first end-to-end digital viral design platform to counter the looming global threat of antimicrobial resistance.
highlight.zh: Felix 打造首個端到端的數位病毒設計平台，以因應日益逼近的全球抗藥性威脅。

summary.en: The easiest way to set up an AI agent and connect it to 1000+ apps like Gmail, Notion, and Stripe.
summary.zh: 設定 AI 代理並串接 Gmail、Notion、Stripe 等 1000 多種應用的最簡單方式。

highlight.en: Operator.io onboards an AI executive assistant that handles the tasks you know need doing but never have bandwidth for.
highlight.zh: Operator.io 讓你導入一位 AI 行政助理，處理那些你明知該做卻始終沒空處理的任務。

summary.en: Riya Collective is building the first community-driven global marketplace.
summary.zh: Riya Collective 正打造首個由社群驅動的全球市集。

highlight.en: Riya Collective centers a community-driven model to power a global marketplace.
highlight.zh: Riya Collective 以社群驅動模式為核心，支撐其全球市集的運作。

summary.en: Altay develops small-molecule drugs targeting transcription factors to treat chronic liver disease.
summary.zh: Altay 開發針對轉錄因子的小分子藥物，用於治療慢性肝病。

highlight.en: Its small molecule reversed fibrotic tissue back to normal in mouse models; a co-founder previously led the program behind FDA-approved Esbriet.
highlight.zh: 其小分子藥物在小鼠模型中可將纖維化組織逆轉為正常組織；共同創辦人曾主導 FDA 核准藥物 Esbriet 的研發計畫。

summary.en: Accounting software built to manage your business finances.
summary.zh: 用於管理企業財務的會計軟體。

highlight.en: Modernbanc offers a simple-to-set-up yet flexible and powerful platform for handling business finances.
highlight.zh: Modernbanc 提供一個設定簡單卻又靈活強大的平台，用於處理企業財務。

summary.en: A payments suite, including ACH, built for the cannabis industry — Stripe for cannabis.
summary.zh: 專為大麻產業打造、含 ACH 在內的支付方案，堪稱大麻界的 Stripe。

highlight.en: Dispensaries, MSOs, and marketplaces use Swifter's software and APIs to accept payments, send payouts, and grow.
highlight.zh: 藥房、多州營運商與市集皆使用 Swifter 的軟體與 API 來收款、發放款項並推動成長。

summary.en: Volumetric builds living multicellular tissues for testing, screening, and drug development.
summary.zh: Volumetric 打造活體多細胞組織，用於檢測、篩選與藥物開發。

highlight.en: Its Science-cover 3D bioprinting builds tissue with complex blood vessel networks, aiming long-term at whole-organ replacements from a patient's own cells.
highlight.zh: 其登上《Science》封面的 3D 生物列印技術可打造具複雜血管網路的組織，長期目標是用病患自身細胞製造可替換的完整器官。

summary.en: AI that tells mining companies where to drill and how much gold lies between drillholes.
summary.zh: 以 AI 告訴礦業公司在何處鑽探，並預測鑽孔之間的含金量。

highlight.en: StratumAI replaces statistical interpolation with deep learning, projected to create around $10M in annual value for the average mine.
highlight.zh: StratumAI 以深度學習取代統計插值法，預估可為一般礦場每年創造約 1,000 萬美元的價值。

summary.en: Design and send emails and texts from your app with a single simple API.
summary.zh: 以單一簡單 API，從你的應用程式設計並寄送電子郵件與簡訊。

highlight.en: A developer-focused message builder and API aiming to do for mailer libraries what Prisma did for ORMs.
highlight.zh: 一個以開發者為核心的訊息建構工具與 API，目標是為郵件函式庫帶來如 Prisma 之於 ORM 的變革。

summary.en: Quickly build internal no-code tools for your ops team's manual workflows.
summary.zh: 快速為營運團隊的手動流程打造無程式碼的內部工具。

highlight.en: Flowdash builds semi-automated workflows that automate where it makes sense while weaving in human intuition where processes can't be fully automated.
highlight.zh: Flowdash 打造半自動化工作流程，在合理之處導入自動化，並在無法完全自動化的環節保留人為判斷。

summary.en: All-in-one software for managing self-storage facilities of any size.
summary.zh: 管理各種規模自助倉儲設施的一站式軟體。

highlight.en: OpenUnit bundles online presence, reservations, legal agreements, insurance, payments, POS, and accounting for storage operators.
highlight.zh: OpenUnit 為倉儲業者整合線上門面、預約系統、法律合約、保險、支付、銷售點與會計等功能。

summary.en: An open-source framework for generating AI agents.
summary.zh: 用於生成 AI 代理的開源框架。

highlight.en: Aden ships its agent generation framework as open source, distributed via its Hive repository on GitHub.
highlight.zh: Aden 以開源形式發布其代理生成框架，並透過 GitHub 上的 Hive 儲存庫提供。

summary.en: A social video chat app for engaging groups through 1-on-1 conversations.
summary.zh: 一款透過一對一對話讓群組互動的社交視訊聊天應用。

highlight.en: Glimpse engages groups of 4 to 400,000 with back-to-back round-robin chats or typed rooms for enhanced pairings, plus games and photos.
highlight.zh: Glimpse 可透過接力式輪轉聊天或分類房間，讓 4 至 40 萬人的群組互動，並支援遊戲與拍照等功能。

summary.en: Software that helps enterprises train college CS students on essential job skills.
summary.zh: 協助企業訓練大學資工系學生掌握必要職場技能的軟體。

highlight.en: Enterprises like Google and Dropbox use Edlyft to ramp up college CS students before hiring, instead of spending 6-12 months training new grads.
highlight.zh: Google、Dropbox 等企業利用 Edlyft 在錄用前先培訓大學資工系學生，省去新人到職後 6 至 12 個月的養成期。

summary.en: Safer, faster open-source dependency upgrades for software teams.
summary.zh: 為軟體團隊提供更安全、更快速的開源依賴升級。

highlight.en: Infield automates the toil of reading changelogs, assessing risk, and upgrading packages so teams can focus on shipping features.
highlight.zh: Infield 將閱讀變更日誌、評估風險與升級套件等繁瑣工作自動化，讓團隊能專注於開發功能。

summary.en: A social and dating app for edge-of-culture communities.
summary.zh: 一款服務次文化社群的社交與交友應用程式。

highlight.en: Plura helps people meet friends and partners organically through shared events, building a referral-based community with a strong consent culture.
highlight.zh: Plura 透過共同參與活動讓人們自然認識朋友與伴侶，並以推薦制與重視同意文化打造安全社群。

summary.en: AI for R&D at consumer brands like P&G to develop better products faster.
summary.zh: 為 P&G 等消費品牌的研發提供 AI，更快開發更好的產品。

highlight.en: Turing harnesses data from multiple sources to make consumer product development decisions 10x faster and more efficient.
highlight.zh: Turing 整合多方資料，讓消費品開發的決策速度與效率提升 10 倍。

summary.en: Build and launch your website in minutes with AI.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 在數分鐘內建立並上線你的網站。

highlight.en: Typedream turns ideas into a ready-to-edit website with AI-generated content, structure, and style that publishes instantly.
highlight.zh: Typedream 以 AI 生成內容、架構與樣式，將構想轉為可立即編輯並發布的網站。

summary.en: A full-stack API and management platform for customer-facing dashboards and reporting.
summary.zh: 用於面向客戶的儀表板與報表的全端 API 與管理平台。

highlight.en: Quill provides a React library, API, and management toolkit purpose-built for embedding customer-facing dashboards.
highlight.zh: Quill 提供專為嵌入式客戶儀表板打造的 React 函式庫、API 與管理工具組。

summary.en: Building electric vehicles for city dwellers — a Tesla for urban living.
summary.zh: 為都市居民打造電動車，堪稱都會生活版的 Tesla。

highlight.en: Nimbus targets city dwellers with an electric vehicle positioned as the urban answer to Tesla.
highlight.zh: Nimbus 鎖定都市居民，推出定位為都會版 Tesla 的電動車。

summary.en: A pseudonymous, avatar-based social network.
summary.zh: 一個以化名與虛擬形象為基礎的社群網路。

highlight.en: Chutney lets people connect through pseudonymous avatars rather than real identities.
highlight.zh: Chutney 讓人們透過化名虛擬形象而非真實身分彼此連結。

summary.en: Cancer tests built on whole-genome and transcriptome data.
summary.zh: 以全基因組與轉錄組資料為基礎的癌症檢測。

highlight.en: Unlike standard tests that read only a few mutations, Isabl sequences and analyzes a tumor's entire genome to aid treatment planning and biomarker discovery.
highlight.zh: 有別於只判讀少數突變的標準檢測，Isabl 對腫瘤的完整基因組進行定序與分析，以輔助治療規劃與生物標記發掘。

summary.en: A family AI copilot that helps parents handle the invisible load of daily life.
summary.zh: 一款家庭 AI 副駕，協助父母處理日常生活中隱形的繁瑣負擔。

highlight.en: Milo pairs a human in the loop with LLMs to tackle detailed, high-context parenting tasks through a simple conversational SMS interface.
highlight.zh: Milo 結合人工協作與大型語言模型，透過簡單的對話式簡訊介面，處理育兒中繁瑣且高情境的任務。

summary.en: Discover culinary products and experiences from great makers around the world.
summary.zh: 探索來自世界各地優質職人的飲食產品與體驗。

highlight.en: Kaiten gathers hundreds of makers — chefs, vineyards, knife makers, ceramicists — so you can find anything from rare wine to a day at a Michelin-star kitchen.
highlight.zh: Kaiten 匯集數百位職人，從廚師、酒莊到刀匠與陶藝家，讓你能找到從珍稀美酒到在米其林餐廳工作一日等各種體驗。

summary.en: Dashboards and actionable insights for high-performing engineering teams.
summary.zh: 為高效能工程團隊提供儀表板與可執行的洞察。

highlight.en: Okay surfaces actionable metrics to help engineering teams understand and improve how they perform.
highlight.zh: Okay 呈現可執行的指標，協助工程團隊了解並提升自身的運作表現。

summary.en: Create active, collaborative learning experiences.
summary.zh: 打造主動且協作的學習體驗。

highlight.en: Clayboard focuses on turning passive lessons into active, collaborative learning experiences.
highlight.zh: Clayboard 致力於將被動的課程轉化為主動且協作的學習體驗。

summary.en: AI for security cameras.
summary.zh: 為監視攝影機打造的 AI。

highlight.en: Visual One applies AI to security cameras to make their footage more useful.
highlight.zh: Visual One 將 AI 應用於監視攝影機，讓其影像更具實用價值。

summary.en: Modern egg freezing for half the cost and half the time, with top doctors.
summary.zh: 由頂尖醫師提供、成本與耗時皆減半的現代凍卵服務。

highlight.en: Lilia reimagines egg freezing to be faster and roughly half the cost, delivered with top-tier doctors.
highlight.zh: Lilia 重新設計凍卵流程，使其更快速且成本約減半，並由頂尖醫師執行。

summary.en: A developer experience platform for API-driven companies.
summary.zh: 為以 API 為核心的公司打造的開發者體驗平台。

highlight.en: Companies like Xendit and AssemblyAI use Hoss for documentation, deep API usage visibility, third-party API monitoring, and developer dashboards.
highlight.zh: Xendit、AssemblyAI 等公司運用 Hoss 來提供文件、深入掌握 API 使用狀況、監控第三方 API 並建立開發者儀表板。

summary.en: Dynamic sales materials that adapt based on each customer's needs.
summary.zh: 依各客戶需求動態變化的銷售素材。

highlight.en: Quickcard's self-serve platform builds personalized, actionable sales documents that replace outdated email attachments.
highlight.zh: Quickcard 的自助式平台可建立個人化且可執行的銷售文件，取代過時的電子郵件附件。

summary.en: ML models that automatically monitor business performance and flag anomalies.
summary.zh: 自動監控業務表現並標示異常的機器學習模型。

highlight.en: Companies onboard in under five minutes with just database credentials — no engineering — and get alerts on abnormal metric drops or spikes.
highlight.zh: 企業僅需資料庫憑證即可在五分鐘內完成導入，無需工程人員，並在指標異常下滑或飆升時收到警示。

summary.en: Transform your unstructured text data into a searchable knowledge graph.
summary.zh: 將你的非結構化文字資料轉為可搜尋的知識圖譜。

highlight.en: Ardis answers complex questions across multiple documents and returns supporting evidence, with an Elasticsearch plug-in on the way.
highlight.zh: Ardis 能跨多份文件回答複雜問題並附上佐證依據，且即將推出 Elasticsearch 外掛。

summary.en: Pashi builds software to operate and optimize production lines.
summary.zh: Pashi 打造用於營運與優化生產線的軟體。

highlight.en: Pashi's software focuses on running and optimizing manufacturing production lines.
highlight.zh: Pashi 的軟體聚焦於營運並優化製造業的生產線。

summary.en: A next-generation calendar app for professionals and teams (acquired by Notion).
summary.zh: 為專業人士與團隊打造的新世代行事曆應用（已被 Notion 收購）。

highlight.en: Cron streamlines workflows, integrates other productivity tools, and builds collaboration into the core calendar experience.
highlight.zh: Cron 精簡工作流程、整合其他生產力工具，並將協作功能融入行事曆的核心體驗中。

summary.en: A third-party tag manager built for speed.
summary.zh: 為速度打造的第三方標籤管理工具。

highlight.en: Zaraz makes any website 40% faster with a single line of code by optimizing how third-party tools load, lifting conversions and SEO.
highlight.zh: Zaraz 僅需一行程式碼，透過優化第三方工具的載入方式讓任何網站快上 40%，並提升轉換率與 SEO 排名。

summary.en: Laguna is a technology startup operating in the real estate space.
summary.zh: Laguna 是一家活躍於房地產領域的科技新創。

highlight.en: Laguna focuses on bringing technology to the real estate sector.
highlight.zh: Laguna 致力於將科技帶入房地產產業。

summary.en: Nugget is a consumer-focused startup with a global reach.
summary.zh: Nugget 是一家面向消費者、放眼全球的新創公司。

highlight.en: Nugget targets a global consumer audience.
highlight.zh: Nugget 鎖定全球的消費者市場。

summary.en: A competitive online community of the brightest students in the world.
summary.zh: 匯聚全球頂尖學生的線上競賽社群。

highlight.en: Pantheon matches high school and middle school students by skill level to compete head-to-head in real time, much like a Science Bowl.
highlight.zh: Pantheon 依程度為國高中學生配對，讓他們即時正面對決，形式類似科學競賽（Science Bowl）。

summary.en: Delightful team-building events for remote companies.
summary.zh: 為遠端公司打造愉快的團隊建立活動。

highlight.en: Cadence helps remote companies stay connected through enjoyable team-building events.
highlight.zh: Cadence 透過愉快的團隊建立活動，協助遠端公司維繫彼此的連結。

summary.en: Software that helps warehouses schedule trucks.
summary.zh: 協助倉庫排程貨車的軟體。

highlight.en: Terusama focuses squarely on helping warehouses schedule incoming and outgoing trucks.
highlight.zh: Terusama 專注於協助倉庫排定進出貨車的時程。

summary.en: A simple stablecoin wallet with free transactions, replacing a global bank account.
summary.zh: 一款交易免手續費的簡易穩定幣錢包，可取代全球銀行帳戶。

highlight.en: Billed as the first self-custodial stablecoin wallet, Peg sends money to any email or phone number worldwide in seconds, across borders.
highlight.zh: 號稱首個自我託管的穩定幣錢包，Peg 可在數秒內向全球任何電子郵件或電話號碼跨境匯款。

summary.en: A subscription service that lets men rent luxury and streetwear fashion affordably.
summary.zh: 讓男性以平價租用精品與街頭潮流服飾的訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Billed as Rent the Runway for men, it rents Yeezy, Gucci, and Balenciaga from $25 a day or $75 a month with weekly two-item swaps.
highlight.zh: 號稱男版 Rent the Runway，可從每日 25 美元或每月 75 美元租用 Yeezy、Gucci、Balenciaga，並每週更換兩件單品。

summary.en: An end-to-end SaaS solution for business onboarding.
summary.zh: 用於企業客戶導入的端到端 SaaS 解決方案。

highlight.en: Zaam combines a smart data-entry form with real-time validation, automated individual and business checks, and a customizable case management dashboard.
highlight.zh: Zaam 結合具即時驗證的智慧資料輸入表單、自動化的個人與企業審查，以及可自訂規則的案件管理儀表板。

summary.en: A platform for fitness instructors to build and grow their business.
summary.zh: 讓健身教練建立並拓展自身事業的平台。

highlight.en: Blok lets fitness pros teach live classes, sell content, partner with brands, and build a unique online brand as they unbundle from gyms.
highlight.zh: Blok 讓健身專業人士開設直播課程、販售內容、與品牌合作並建立獨特的線上品牌，逐步脫離傳統健身房體系。

summary.en: An easy button to turn operational data into repeatable, quality-driven workflows.
summary.zh: 一鍵將營運資料轉為可重複運作、以品質為本的工作流程。

highlight.en: Logarithm Labs turns manual data wrangling and ad-hoc scripts into repeatable pipelines so teams can focus on the business logic that matters.
highlight.zh: Logarithm Labs 將人工資料整理與臨時腳本轉為可重複運作的管線，讓團隊得以專注於關鍵的業務邏輯。

summary.en: A marketplace enabling social commerce for brands and content creators.
summary.zh: 為品牌與內容創作者實現社交電商的市集平台。

highlight.en: Global Belly adds shoppable products to creators' content and has launched 100+ food influencers, shipping thousands of products nationwide.
highlight.zh: Global Belly 為創作者的內容加入可購物商品，已協助超過 100 位美食網紅上線，並在全國寄送數千件商品。

summary.en: A better way to run single-cell genomics.
summary.zh: 執行單細胞基因組學的更佳方式。

highlight.en: Dropprint's software analyzes individual cells rather than averaged signals, cutting single-cell genomics cost 10-fold while scaling to millions of cells.
highlight.zh: Dropprint 的軟體分析個別細胞而非平均訊號，將單細胞基因組學成本降低 10 倍，並可擴展至數百萬個細胞。

summary.en: Low-cost blood glucose test strips scanned with a smartphone camera.
summary.zh: 以智慧型手機相機掃描的低成本血糖試紙。

highlight.en: Simple Strips pairs inexpensive glucose test strips with smartphone-camera scanning to cut the cost of monitoring.
highlight.zh: Simple Strips 將平價血糖試紙與智慧型手機相機掃描結合，以降低監測成本。

summary.en: Virtual events for remote teams.
summary.zh: 為遠端團隊打造的虛擬活動。

highlight.en: Mini Exhibitions helps remote teams gather and connect through virtual events.
highlight.zh: Mini Exhibitions 透過虛擬活動協助遠端團隊聚會並建立連結。

summary.en: An all-in-one platform for building and releasing desktop apps.
summary.zh: 建立並發布桌面應用程式的一站式平台。

highlight.en: ToDesktop saves companies months by handling code signing, auto-updates, and native installers across Windows, Mac, and Linux.
highlight.zh: ToDesktop 為企業處理程式碼簽署、自動更新與 Windows、Mac、Linux 的原生安裝程式，省下數個月的開發時間。

summary.en: Streamlined Salesforce processes for agile go-to-market teams.
summary.zh: 為敏捷的市場進攻團隊精簡 Salesforce 流程。

highlight.en: Laserfocus maximizes selling time by showing reps what to focus on and ensures data lands in the right Salesforce fields for informed decisions.
highlight.zh: Laserfocus 透過提示業務該專注的重點來最大化銷售時間，並確保資料正確落入 Salesforce 欄位以利決策。

summary.en: Snapboard is a software platform serving business teams.
summary.zh: Snapboard 是一個服務企業團隊的軟體平台。

highlight.en: Snapboard builds software tools aimed at business and operations teams.
highlight.zh: Snapboard 打造面向企業與營運團隊的軟體工具。

summary.en: Acorns for India — every digital purchase is rounded up and auto-invested.
summary.zh: 印度版 Acorns，每筆數位消費都會湊整並自動投資。

highlight.en: Spenny rounds each transaction up to the nearest 10 INR and invests the spare change into a diversified portfolio, automatically.
highlight.zh: Spenny 將每筆交易湊整至最接近的 10 盧比，並自動把零頭投入多元化的投資組合。

summary.en: Short-term rentals for business travelers in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在巴西為商務旅客提供的短期租屋服務。

highlight.en: Apartio focuses on short-term rental stays tailored to business travelers in Brazil.
highlight.zh: Apartio 專注於為巴西商務旅客量身打造的短期租屋住宿。

summary.en: An affordable mental self-care app for everyone (acquired by Headspace Health).
summary.zh: 一款人人可負擔的心理自我照護應用（已被 Headspace Health 收購）。

highlight.en: Sayana helps people track thoughts and feelings daily, offers relevant coping tips, and matches users in similar life situations.
highlight.zh: Sayana 協助人們每日記錄想法與情緒、提供相應的調適建議，並讓處境相似的使用者彼此配對。

summary.en: Developing a drug that burns calories and boosts metabolism without exercise.
summary.zh: 開發一款無需運動即可燃燒熱量並提升代謝的藥物。

highlight.en: Equator targets mitochondria to generate heat, addressing the caloric imbalance at the root of obesity and type 2 diabetes after a key protein breakthrough.
highlight.zh: Equator 鎖定粒線體以產生熱能，在發現關鍵蛋白後，從熱量失衡這個肥胖與第二型糖尿病的根源著手。

summary.en: Menten AI designs peptide and protein therapeutics using quantum computing.
summary.zh: Menten AI 運用量子運算設計胜肽與蛋白質療法。

highlight.en: Menten built the first protein-design algorithm for near-term quantum computers and created the world's first protein designed on one.
highlight.zh: Menten 打造首個適用於近期量子電腦的蛋白質設計演算法，並設計出全球首個於量子電腦上完成的蛋白質。

summary.en: A portfolio of delivery-only restaurant brands.
summary.zh: 由多個純外送餐廳品牌組成的事業組合。

highlight.en: Hideout operates a collection of delivery-only restaurant brands rather than traditional dine-in locations.
highlight.zh: Hideout 經營一系列純外送的餐廳品牌，而非傳統的內用門市。

summary.en: An app offering AI-powered workout plans with anytime access to coaches.
summary.zh: 提供 AI 健身計畫並可隨時聯繫教練的應用程式。

highlight.en: FitnessAI generates personalized workout plans with AI while giving users anytime access to human coaches.
highlight.zh: FitnessAI 以 AI 生成個人化的健身計畫，並讓使用者能隨時聯繫真人教練。

summary.en: Glisten AI automatically categorizes and tags e-commerce product data.
summary.zh: Glisten AI 自動為電商商品資料分類與標籤。

highlight.en: Glisten lets retailers and marketplaces taxonomize millions of products to power better search, filtering, recommendations, and analytics.
highlight.zh: Glisten 讓零售商與市集能為數百萬件商品建立分類，以強化搜尋、篩選、推薦與分析。

summary.en: TikTok for musicians — a personalized, endless stream of live music.
summary.zh: 音樂人版的 TikTok，提供個人化且源源不絕的現場音樂串流。

highlight.en: Jamiphy lets you watch, engage, and skip to surface a personalized stream of live music, with easy tools to capture your own musical moments.
highlight.zh: Jamiphy 讓你透過觀看、互動與略過，獲得個人化的現場音樂串流，並提供簡易工具捕捉你自己的音樂時刻。

summary.en: An app that helps you de-stress, sleep better, and meditate.
summary.zh: 一款協助你紓壓、改善睡眠並進行冥想的應用程式。

highlight.en: Deep Meditate offers guided practices to help users reduce stress and sleep more easily.
highlight.zh: Deep Meditate 提供引導式練習，協助使用者減壓並更容易入睡。

summary.en: Protobase is a 10x, next-generation spreadsheet.
summary.zh: Protobase 是一款效率提升 10 倍的新世代試算表。

highlight.en: Protobase keeps familiar sheets, grids, and formulas but adds tables, queries, filters, search, and sorting for more powerful structure.
highlight.zh: Protobase 保留熟悉的工作表、格線與公式，並加入表格、查詢、篩選、搜尋與排序，提供更強大的結構。

summary.en: Dead-simple CI/CD for machine learning teams.
summary.zh: 為機器學習團隊打造極為簡單的 CI/CD。

highlight.en: Scout brings continuous integration and delivery to ML teams with a deliberately simple workflow.
highlight.zh: Scout 以刻意簡化的流程，為機器學習團隊帶來持續整合與持續交付。

summary.en: A community-driven marketplace for used things.
summary.zh: 以社群驅動的二手物品交易市集。

highlight.en: Users bid on unwanted items with virtual coins, helping people declutter for free while buyers find products at up to 95% off.
highlight.zh: 使用者以虛擬代幣競標不需要的物品，讓人免費清理閒置物，買家也能以最高 95% 折扣找到商品。

summary.en: An intelligence layer for internal communications and company culture.
summary.zh: 為內部溝通與企業文化打造的智慧分析層。

highlight.en: Syncro adds an intelligence layer over internal communications to give teams insight into their culture.
highlight.zh: Syncro 在內部溝通之上加入智慧分析層，讓團隊洞悉自身的企業文化。

summary.en: A global payouts API for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創打造的全球付款 API。

highlight.en: Carbon-12 Labs provides an API that lets startups send payouts globally.
highlight.zh: Carbon-12 Labs 提供讓新創能在全球發放款項的 API。

summary.en: Avion builds and operates autonomous eVTOL drones that deliver vital medical supplies.
summary.zh: Avion 打造並營運自駕 eVTOL 無人機，運送關鍵醫療物資。

highlight.en: Avion's drone-based digital health platform links remote clinics to urban labs and pharmacies, delivering supplies and samples even in hard-to-reach terrain.
highlight.zh: Avion 以無人機為基礎的數位健康平台串連偏遠診所與都市檢驗室及藥房，即使在難以抵達的地形也能運送物資與檢體。

summary.en: An accounting, payments, and credit app for 60M micro-businesses in Indonesia.
summary.zh: 為印尼 6,000 萬家微型企業打造的記帳、支付與信貸應用。

highlight.en: BukuWarung builds digital infrastructure — bookkeeping, online storefronts, and payments — to make Indonesia's MSMEs financially aware and help them grow.
highlight.zh: BukuWarung 打造記帳、線上門市與支付等數位基礎設施，讓印尼的中小微型企業更具財務意識並協助其成長。

summary.en: An investment platform for individuals across the MENA region.
summary.zh: 為中東與北非地區個人打造的投資平台。

highlight.en: Thndr lets MENA individuals invest in stocks, gold, and fixed income through a single platform.
highlight.zh: Thndr 讓中東與北非的個人能透過單一平台投資股票、黃金與固定收益商品。

summary.en: India's largest EV charging network.
summary.zh: 印度最大的電動車充電網路。

highlight.en: Statiq lets EV owners find and pre-book chargers while property owners earn by hosting chargers at malls, workplaces, restaurants, and hotels.
highlight.zh: Statiq 讓電動車車主尋找並預約充電站，同時讓物業主透過在商場、職場、餐廳與飯店設置充電樁來賺取收益。

summary.en: Spend management software giving businesses visibility and control over payables.
summary.zh: 讓企業掌握並控管應付帳款的支出管理軟體。

highlight.en: Spenmo unifies bill payment, corporate cards, transfers, and expense claims, helping finance teams close books in 90% less time.
highlight.zh: Spenmo 整合帳單支付、企業卡、轉帳與費用報銷，協助財務團隊以少 90% 的時間結帳。

summary.en: Helps restaurants take online orders directly from customers across Latin America.
summary.zh: 協助拉丁美洲餐廳直接向顧客接收線上訂單。

highlight.en: Operating in six Latin American countries, Justo gives restaurants their own online store plus marketing and last-mile delivery at a fairer price.
highlight.zh: Justo 在六個拉美國家營運，為餐廳提供專屬線上商店、行銷與最後一哩配送，且收費更為合理。

summary.en: Vertical AI for audit and advisory firms.
summary.zh: 為審計與顧問事務所打造的垂直 AI。

highlight.en: Built by former Big Four practitioners, Fieldguide digitizes the end-to-end engagement workflow so CPA firms improve margins and win new business.
highlight.zh: 由前四大會計師事務所專家打造，Fieldguide 將委任案件的端到端流程數位化，協助會計師事務所提升利潤並爭取新業務。

summary.en: Plan, communicate, and benchmark your compensation in real time.
summary.zh: 即時規劃、溝通並對標你的薪酬。

highlight.en: Pave replaces spreadsheets with real-time integrations to your HRIS, ATS, and cap table for smarter compensation decisions.
highlight.zh: Pave 以即時串接 HRIS、ATS 與股權表的方式取代試算表，協助做出更明智的薪酬決策。

summary.en: AI to engage employees, predict attrition, and automate HR/IT support.
summary.zh: 以 AI 提升員工投入度、預測離職並自動化 HR/IT 支援。

highlight.en: inFeedo's conversational AI bot Amber helps leaders find hidden gaps in culture and wellbeing in real time across customers like Samsung, TATA, and Lenovo.
highlight.zh: inFeedo 的對話式 AI 機器人 Amber 協助領導者即時找出文化與員工福祉的隱性缺口，客戶包括 Samsung、TATA 與 Lenovo。

summary.en: Transform your decision-making with reliable AI agents in weeks, not months.
summary.zh: 以可靠的 AI 代理，在數週而非數月內改造你的決策流程。

highlight.en: Built for regulated environments, Taktile's agentic decision platform helps 200+ financial institutions approve customers, catch fraud, and stay compliant.
highlight.zh: Taktile 專為受監管環境打造的代理式決策平台，協助超過 200 家金融機構核准客戶、偵測詐欺並維持合規。

summary.en: An all-in-one financial platform for Latin American startups and SMBs.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲新創與中小企業打造的一站式金融平台。

highlight.en: Conta Simples combines a checking account, expense management software, and corporate cards in a single platform for Latam companies.
highlight.zh: Conta Simples 在單一平台中整合支票帳戶、支出管理軟體與企業卡，服務拉美企業。

summary.en: The easiest way to get started with Postgres — build in a weekend, scale to millions.
summary.zh: 上手 Postgres 最簡單的方式，一個週末就能打造、規模可擴展至數百萬。

highlight.en: Each project is an isolated Postgres cluster with instant setup, auth, row-level security, realtime streams, and auto-generated APIs.
highlight.zh: 每個專案都是獨立的 Postgres 叢集，具備即時建置、身分驗證、列級安全、即時資料串流與自動產生的 API。

summary.en: A modular platform for events and webinars that helps marketers drive growth.
summary.zh: 模組化的活動與網路研討會平台，協助行銷人推動成長。

highlight.en: Zuddl's modular approach lets B2B marketers pick the components they need; teams from Microsoft, Google, and the UN trust the platform.
highlight.zh: Zuddl 的模組化設計讓 B2B 行銷人挑選所需的功能元件，Microsoft、Google 與聯合國等團隊皆採用此平台。

summary.en: Personalized virtual care for patients with neurodegenerative diseases.
summary.zh: 為神經退化性疾病患者提供個人化的虛擬醫療照護。

highlight.en: Synapticure centers each patient and caregiver around a coordinator who quarterbacks them through care for ALS, Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, and Huntington's.
highlight.zh: Synapticure 為每位患者與照護者配置協調員，統籌引導他們走過 ALS、阿茲海默症、帕金森氏症與亨丁頓舞蹈症的照護歷程。

summary.en: Power commerce photography with generative AI.
summary.zh: 以生成式 AI 賦能商務攝影。

highlight.en: Photoroom uses deep learning to turn pixels into objects, simplifying tasks like background removal so anyone can compose standout images without training.
highlight.zh: Photoroom 運用深度學習將像素轉為物件，簡化去背等任務，讓任何人無需訓練即可製作出色的影像。

summary.en: Give your software the sense of sight — tools for building computer vision.
summary.zh: 賦予你的軟體視覺能力，提供打造電腦視覺的工具。

highlight.en: Over 250k developers, including half the Fortune 100, use Roboflow to build datasets, models, and deployments for computer vision.
highlight.zh: 超過 25 萬名開發者（含半數財星 100 大企業）使用 Roboflow 建立電腦視覺的資料集、模型與部署。

summary.en: We train AI engineers and connect them with companies.
summary.zh: 培訓 AI 工程師並協助他們與企業媒合。

highlight.en: HENRY trains AI engineers, ML and data scientists, and AI product engineers, and helps companies accelerate AI adoption.
highlight.zh: HENRY 培訓 AI 工程師、機器學習與資料科學家及 AI 產品工程師，並協助企業加速導入 AI。

summary.en: The real estate super app for Mexico.
summary.zh: 墨西哥的房地產超級應用程式。

highlight.en: Clau combines a marketplace of 20,000+ properties with a broker CRM, mortgage brokerage, renovations, and Mexico's leading residential real estate data layer.
highlight.zh: Clau 整合逾 2 萬筆物件的市集、仲介 CRM、房貸經紀、裝修服務與該國領先的住宅房地產資料層。

summary.en: An all-in-one platform for creators to sell courses and subscriptions.
summary.zh: 讓創作者販售課程與訂閱方案的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Billed as Shopify for creators, Hubla lets anyone build courses, communities, and memberships — its top creator earns over $8M annually.
highlight.zh: 號稱創作者版的 Shopify，Hubla 讓任何人都能打造課程、社群與會員制，其頂尖創作者年收入超過 800 萬美元。

summary.en: LinkedIn for skilled blue-collar workers.
summary.zh: 技術藍領工作者版的 LinkedIn。

highlight.en: PowerUs helps skilled tradespeople like electricians and mechanics get job offers paying up to 50% more, with just 10 minutes of effort.
highlight.zh: PowerUs 協助電工、技工等技術藍領工作者僅花 10 分鐘，就能獲得薪資高出最多 50% 的工作機會。

summary.en: Modernizing global transportation payments — Stripe for trucking and logistics.
summary.zh: 革新全球運輸支付，堪稱貨運物流界的 Stripe。

highlight.en: AtoB's flagship is a zero-fee fuel card accepted anywhere, built to fix the outdated, fraud-prone payment tools that trucking fleets rely on.
highlight.zh: AtoB 的旗艦產品是一張處處可用、零手續費的加油卡，旨在改善貨運車隊所仰賴、過時且易遭詐欺的支付工具。

summary.en: Home inspections, simplified.
summary.zh: 讓房屋檢查變簡單。

highlight.en: Inspectify applies modern technology to make inspectors more effective and home inspections more engaging for buyers and real estate professionals.
highlight.zh: Inspectify 運用現代技術提升驗屋師的效率，並讓買家與房地產專業人士的驗屋過程更具參與感。
